title: rhododendron quinquefolium
intro: Rhododendron quinquefolium, also known as the five-leaf rhododendron, is a perennial evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron quinquefolium include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
